narrative:
Colerain Twp. township has 41,891 registered voters, with 57.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.9%, a modest Republican lean of 3.0 percentage points.
